findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: In all five sediment data tables, the 'Risk Assessment' sub-header row is rendered with duplicated text ('Risk Assessment' | 'Risk Assessment') across both columns. In the PDF, 'Risk Assessment' is a single underlined label spanning the full width of each callout box, not a two-cell data row. The underlying data (CR, HI values) is intact, but the header is misrepresented as a data cell pair.
findings.evidence: HTML: Risk AssessmentRisk Assessment appears in all five tables (SD-1 through SD-5). PDF: 'Risk Assessment' appears once as an underlined section label within each callout, not duplicated across columns.
